formulas.name: Pseudocode
formulas.formula: A high-level description of an algorithm using natural language and basic control structures
formulas.notes: Used as a preliminary stage of programming to design and plan the code

formulas.name: Algorithm
formulas.formula: A well-defined procedure that takes some value, or set of values, as input and produces a corresponding output
formulas.notes: Used for solving a specific problem in a finite number of steps

formulas.name: Flowchart
formulas.formula: A graphical representation of an algorithm using symbols and arrows
formulas.notes: Used for visualizing and understanding the flow of an algorithm

formulas.name: Top-Down Approach
formulas.formula: Breaking down a problem into smaller sub-problems and solving them recursively
formulas.notes: Used for solving complex problems by dividing them into manageable parts

formulas.name: Bottom-Up Approach
formulas.formula: Solving small problems and combining them to solve larger problems
formulas.notes: Used for solving complex problems by combining smaller solutions

formulas.name: Recursion
formulas.formula: A function that calls itself in its definition
formulas.notes: Used for solving problems that have a recursive structure

formulas.name: Iterative Method
formulas.formula: A method that uses a loop to solve a problem
formulas.notes: Used for solving problems that require repetition
